title: Xtra Comforting Irish Potatoes Casserole
description: A sweet and springy Irish dish featuring floury potatoes, this casserole is perfect for a comforting meal. It is ovo-vegetarian-friendly and features salt-baked potatoes.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Peel and slice the potatoes into 1/4 inch thick rounds.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced potatoes and melted butter, tossing to coat.
In a separate bowl, mix together the brown sugar, granulated sugar, eggs, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sugar and egg mixture to the potatoes and toss to combine.
Transfer the potato mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake the casserole for 45 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and the top is lightly browned.
Remove the casserole from the oven and sprinkle with chopped scallions, if using.
Return the casserole to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until the scallions are lightly browned.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
